text:
The Kakin Announcer is an announcer on the Black Whale. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 359 

Appearance

The Kakin announcer has cat-like eyes and ears with hair that reaches her shoulders. Both her dress and shoes have a patterned design, and she wears a bracelet on both of her wrists. 

Personality

The Kakin announcer maintains an informative and professional personality when explaining the voyage details to the ship's passengers. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

In the Theater Venue on Tier 2 of the Black Whale, the announcer welcomes the passengers and explains that the voyage will last two months. In front of a large map and holding a microphone, she continues by saying that after they exit humanity's known waters, they will refuel and perform a final check of the ship. She stresses that the air will be more dangerous than the sea and cites severe storms and flying creatures as reasons why the ship's top dome will have to be closed. She concludes her presentation by saying that after five more weeks of being rocked by rough seas, they will finally reach the Dark Continent. The crowded auditorium then cheers and applauds. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Intertextuality and References

The character's appearance could be a reference to Lum from the manga series Urusei Yatsura.
She is also similar to Koto, the announcer during the Dark Tournament in YuYu Hakusho, another series from Togashi.
